full_text:
Zhao Guoda (Triệu Quốc Đạt) 趙國達
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Guoda (Triệu Quốc Đạt) (趙國達). Trieu Au’s older brother. Zhao Guoda (Triệu Quốc Đạt) may not have existed in history. Zhao Guoda (Triệu Quốc Đạt) lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
